title: Used To Be Easy — Video
description: A visual project about memory, nostalgia, distance, connection, and personal history, centered on The Walker and warm memory silhouettes.

title: Used To Be Easy — Memory, Not Ghosts
description: The Walker and the warm memory silhouettes frame remembered connection without turning memory into a supernatural effect.

title: Systems, Stories, and the Same Curiosity
description: Software, music, and worldbuilding use different materials, but repeatedly return to emergence, persistence, identity, responsibility, and connection.

title: Quality Is Designed, Not Inspected
description: Quality begins in architecture, interfaces, feedback loops, and documentation—before a final test run can inspect the result.

title: Maintainability Over Hype
description: New tools are useful when they make a system easier to understand, operate, or change—not merely newer.

title: JARVIS Alpha
description: JARVIS reaches its alpha state as a personal orchestration platform.

title: Grounded Fire in Three Acts
description: Grounded Fire moves from disconnection through reactivation toward self-respect expressed with intensity rather than apology.

title: Grounded Fire
description: A concept album about reconnection after emotional and technological disconnection, moving through disconnection, reactivation, and self-respect through intensity.

title: From Human Test Cases to Playwright
description: The Test Generation Platform explores how human-readable KiwiTCMS cases can become executable Playwright automation without losing their intent.

title: External Repositories in a Testing Ecosystem
description: The External Playwright Adapter treats repository ownership as an architectural boundary instead of an inconvenience to remove.

title: DNS Database and Lifecycle-Focused Design
description: What a large Go backend taught me about tests, documentation, storage lifecycles, and engineering for the person who returns later.

title: Core Override — Identity in Digital Life
description: Core Override follows technology, routine, communication, and personal agency through songs about modern connection and rebuilding.

title: Core Override
description: An album about technology, identity, routine, digital relationships, self-awareness, rebuilding, and personal agency.

title: Autonomous Until the Gate
description: JARVIS should reduce context switching and carry work forward autonomously, while preserving explicit human gates for consequential decisions.

title: Artifacts of Resilience — Endurance as a Record
description: Artifacts of Resilience treats persistence, responsibility, recovery, and the cost of continuing as one connected body of work.

title: Artifacts of Resilience
description: An album about endurance through difficult periods: resilience, responsibility, persistence, and recovery.

title: Architecture Is Communication
description: Architecture matters when it helps the next person understand why a system is shaped the way it is.

title: Test Generation Platform
description: Human-readable test cases begin moving through a repeatable path into Playwright automation.

title: Alpha Strike Labs GmbH
description: Approximately 5.5 years across OSINT systems, backend work, test automation, CI/CD, Docker, VPN testing, and mentoring.
